title: 💼AdSense for Search (AFS) Policy
body:
🧭 Introduction

At ChampionsReviews.Com, we use Google AdSense for Search (AFS) to enhance user experience by allowing visitors to search for relevant products, content, and resources.
To ensure compliance with Google’s policies, this document outlines our standards for implementing and managing AdSense for Search on our website.

For clarity:

  • “Ads” refer exclusively to advertisements provided by Google.
  • “Content” means everything displayed on our website, including articles, product listings, search results, images, links, and ads (from Google or other networks).
  • Where Google’s approval is required, it applies solely to Google services and ads provided through Google AdSense.

By using AFS, ChampionsReviews.Com agrees to comply with these rules, along with the AdSense Program Policies.
Google may take corrective action for non-compliance, including suspension or modification of services as described in the AdSense Online Terms of Service.

⚙️ 1. Query Modification Policy

All search queries on ChampionsReviews.Com must come directly from genuine user intent and interaction.

We ensure that:

  • Search queries are entered directly by users in our search box — without pre-filled keywords or hidden inputs.
  • We do not modify, pre-populate, or auto-generate queries in any way.
  • We may use only Google-approved Product-Integrated Features or Alternative Search Queries that comply with AdSense AFS policies.

✅ Our Commitment:
User search activity on our site always reflects authentic intent — never manipulation or automation.

🔐 2. Code Modification Restrictions

We do not alter, edit, or tamper with any AdSense for Search (AFS) code provided by Google.

Specifically:

  • We do not modify the AFS code for any purpose.
  • We do not frame, embed, or rebrand AdSense search results.
  • We do not remove, hide, or alter the official Google logo in any search result display.

✅ Our Commitment:
All AFS code on ChampionsReviews.Com remains 100% unmodified and compliant.

🧩 3. Search Box & Ad Placement

  • A maximum of two (2) Google AdSense for Search boxes may appear on any page.
  • AFS code is used only on search results pages, never on homepages, landing pages, or within downloadable software.
  • AFS ads or code are not integrated into any third-party software (e.g., browser extensions, toolbars, or apps).

✅ Our Commitment:
Search boxes and ads are always placed clearly and responsibly, ensuring a smooth user experience.

📚 4. Searchable Content Standards

We only display AFS ads alongside content that complies with:

  • Google’s Content and Copyright Policies, and
  • ChampionsReviews.Com’s Content Policy, which prohibits illegal, misleading, or infringing materials.

✅ Our Commitment:
We never use AFS on pages centered around copyrighted or restricted content.

🚫 5. No Incentivized Searches

We strictly prohibit any form of reward, incentive, or compensation for performing searches or viewing ads.

Examples of violations:

  • Offering points, credits, or gifts for using the search box.
  • Encouraging users to perform searches to unlock offers or rewards.

✅ Our Commitment:
All search activity on ChampionsReviews.Com is voluntary and unmanipulated.

⏱️ 6. Query Limit

Each user request can trigger only one search query.
We operate well within Google’s annual limit of 5 billion queries per account (August 1 – July 31).

✅ Our Commitment:
Search query usage on ChampionsReviews.Com always remains compliant with Google’s technical thresholds.

🔍 7. Use of Other Search Services

ChampionsReviews.Com may integrate other internet search tools alongside Google’s AFS, provided that:

  • The design does not imitate Google’s search box or branding.
  • Any alternative search engine maintains distinct styling and labeling.
  • Optional internal “site search” tools are permitted but clearly separated from AFS.

✅ Our Commitment:
We respect Google’s brand integrity and maintain clear visual distinction between Google and non-Google features.

⚠️ 8. Self-Search and Ad Click Integrity

Team members, content partners, and admins at ChampionsReviews.Com are strictly prohibited from:

  • Using our own search box for test searches repeatedly.
  • Clicking on Google ads displayed on our own pages.

This ensures that reports and analytics reflect only legitimate user traffic.

✅ Our Commitment:
We maintain strict controls to avoid accidental or self-generated ad interactions.

💬 9. Displaying Ads and Search Together

Yes — ChampionsReviews.Com may display:

  • Regular Google AdSense display units and
  • AdSense for Search boxes on the same page,
    as long as both comply with program policies.

When users perform a search, they are directed to a separate search results page that may also show AFS ads — without overlap or ad congestion.

✅ Our Commitment:
We maintain clean page design and clarity between ads and search results.

🧱 10. Non-AFS Google Ads on Search Results Pages

We do not place additional Google ad types (text, image, or video) on pages displaying framed AFS results.
However, link units or an additional AFS search box are permitted.

✅ Our Commitment:
Our pages maintain a clean and uncluttered ad experience that complies with Google layout standards.

🧠 11. Policy Enforcement and Review

ChampionsReviews.Com regularly audits our AdSense for Search implementation to ensure:

  • Full adherence to Google’s latest AFS policies.
  • Transparency in ad display and user interaction.
  • Prevention of unintentional violations.

Non-compliance may result in suspension or modification of AFS privileges.
We cooperate fully with Google’s policy review processes when requested.

🕊️ Summary

Our use of Google AdSense for Search reflects our commitment to:

  • Transparency
  • User trust
  • Ad experience quality
  • Technical and ethical compliance with Google’s advertising ecosystem

ChampionsReviews.Com ensures that all AFS usage, code, and configurations are continuously reviewed for compliance with the latest Google AdSense policies.

Last Updated: October 2025
Contact Us: https://www.championsreviews.com/contact
